channel.title: UI/UX on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.
channel.description: Recent content in UI/UX on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.

item.title: Sound Effects
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about sound effects.

item.title: Inventory UI: Grid vs. List
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about inventory UI and specifically, gridbased versus listbased user interfaces.

item.title: A Non-Game Design Spec
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about a noname design spec.

item.title: Damage Numbers
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about damage numbers — yes, those little numbers that fly off of people when you hit them in games — because that’s actually an interesting topic to talk about, and

item.title: UX Design
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about ux design specifically.

item.title: Focus Group Testing
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about focus groups because I have a LoveHate relationship with focus group testing and

item.title: The Music of Fallout
item.description: Hi. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about something that’s near and dear to me, which is fallout’s music.
